requirement_topic.en: ARTCI Homologation — Radio / Telecom Terminal Equipment Type Approval
requirement_topic.zh: ARTCI准入认证——无线电/电信终端设备型式认可
requirement_topic.zht: ARTCI準入認證——無線電/電信終端設備型式認可

summary.en: All radio and telecommunications terminal equipment sold or used in Côte d'Ivoire must obtain ARTCI mandatory homologation (type approval) under Loi 2012-293 sur les Télécommunications/TIC. The ARTCI homologation certificate and label must accompany the product before import and customs clearance. Applications require submission of a French-language technical dossier and test reports from ARTCI-recognised labs or labs holding ILAC/MRA accreditation. CE, FCC, and CCC marks are not directly recognised by ARTCI and do not substitute for homologation. The 5 GHz band is subject to ARTCI indoor-use restrictions.
summary.zh: 在科特迪瓦销售或使用的所有无线电及电信终端设备须依据《2012-293号电信/信息通信技术法》取得ARTCI强制准入认证（型式认可）。ARTCI准入认证证书及标签须在进口及海关放行前随附产品。申请须提交法语技术文件及ARTCI认可实验室或持有ILAC/MRA认证实验室的测试报告。CE、FCC和CCC标志不被ARTCI直接承认，不能替代准入认证。5 GHz频段须遵守ARTCI室内使用限制。
summary.zht: 在科特迪瓦銷售或使用的所有無線電及電信終端設備須依據《2012-293號電信/資訊通訊技術法》取得ARTCI強制準入認證（型式認可）。ARTCI準入認證證書及標籤須在進口及海關放行前隨附產品。申請須提交法語技術文件及ARTCI認可實驗室或持有ILAC/MRA認證實驗室的測試報告。CE、FCC和CCC標誌不被ARTCI直接承認，不能替代準入認證。5 GHz頻段須遵守ARTCI室內使用限制。

standards_or_laws: Loi 2012-293 sur les Télécommunications/TIC de Côte d'Ivoire
ARTCI homologation procedure (technical dossier + accredited lab test reports)

summary.en: China requires MIIT/SRRC radio type approval (CMIIT ID) for wireless transmitters and a MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) for telecommunications terminal equipment. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) may also apply for RF components in scope. SRRC and NAL are China-domestic approvals only and carry no recognition in Côte d'Ivoire.
summary.zh: 中国对无线电发射设备要求工信部/SRRC无线电型式核准（CMIIT ID），对电信终端设备要求工信部网络接入许可（NAL）。CCC（中国强制认证）也可能适用于范围内的射频元器件。SRRC和NAL均为中国境内批准，在科特迪瓦不受承认。
summary.zht: 中國對無線電發射設備要求工信部/SRRC無線電型式核准（CMIIT ID），對電信終端設備要求工信部網路接入許可（NAL）。CCC（中國強制認證）也可能適用於範圍內的射頻元器件。SRRC和NAL均為中國境內批准，在科特迪瓦不受承認。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval (CMIIT ID)

gap.en: Full gap: ARTCI homologation is an independent Ivorian national process. SRRC, CMIIT, CE, FCC, and CCC marks are not accepted by ARTCI. A French-language technical dossier and test reports from ARTCI-recognised or ILAC/MRA-accredited labs are required. Devices must carry the ARTCI label before customs clearance. Products with 5 GHz Wi-Fi must comply with ARTCI indoor-only band restrictions. ECOWAS harmonisation is developing but does not yet replace national ARTCI homologation.
gap.zh: 完全差距：ARTCI准入认证是独立的科特迪瓦国家流程。ARTCI不接受SRRC、CMIIT、CE、FCC和CCC标志。须提交法语技术文件及ARTCI认可或ILAC/MRA认可实验室的测试报告。设备须在海关放行前贴附ARTCI标签。含5 GHz Wi-Fi的产品须符合ARTCI仅限室内的频段限制。ECOWAS协调工作正在推进，但尚不能取代ARTCI国家准入认证。
gap.zht: 完全差距：ARTCI準入認證是獨立的科特迪瓦國家流程。ARTCI不接受SRRC、CMIIT、CE、FCC和CCC標誌。須提交法語技術文件及ARTCI認可或ILAC/MRA認可實驗室的測試報告。設備須在海關放行前貼附ARTCI標籤。含5 GHz Wi-Fi的產品須符合ARTCI僅限室內的頻段限制。ECOWAS協調工作正在推進，但尚不能取代ARTCI國家準入認證。

source.publisher: ARTCI — Autorité de Régulation des Télécommunications/TIC de Côte d'Ivoire

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese SRRC, CMIIT, CE, FCC, and CCC approvals do not satisfy ARTCI homologation requirements. A separate ARTCI application with a French-language technical dossier and ARTCI-recognised lab test reports is required before import or sale in Côte d'Ivoire. Products must bear the ARTCI label before customs clearance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国SRRC、CMIIT、CE、FCC和CCC批准均不满足ARTCI准入认证要求。须另行提交含法语技术文件及ARTCI认可实验室测试报告的ARTCI申请，方可在科特迪瓦进口或销售。产品须在海关放行前贴附ARTCI标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國SRRC、CMIIT、CE、FCC和CCC批准均不滿足ARTCI準入認證要求。須另行提交含法語技術文件及ARTCI認可實驗室測試報告的ARTCI申請，方可在科特迪瓦進口或銷售。產品須在海關放行前貼附ARTCI標籤。
